message:
Add changelog entry for replace operator crash fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+---
+title: Fix crash in replace operator when replacing with null
+type: bugfix
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+pr: 5696
+created: 2026-01-29T08:51:10.900215Z
+---
+
+The `replace` operator no longer crashes when using `with=null` on data that
+was processed by certain operators like `ocsf::cast`. The crash occurred because
+the operator attempted to modify read-only data when marking values as null.
+
+For example, the following pipeline previously crashed but now works correctly:
+
+```tql
+load_file "dns.json"
+read_json
+ocsf::cast "dns_activity"
+replace what="", with=null
+```
